title: URL parse+extract duplicated inline three times across server.rs and delivery.rs
description:
The pattern of parsing a URI, extracting the path, and extracting the host is inlined three times:

- delivery.rs lines 185-187 (target_path) and 300-305 (extract_domain as a standalone fn)
- server.rs lines 482-488 (target_path and inbox_domain in Follow handler)

extract_domain() already exists as a private fn in delivery.rs but is not reachable from server.rs. The path-extraction pattern is copy-pasted.

Fix: move extract_domain and a companion extract_path into a small pub fn in a shared location (e.g., signatures.rs or a new urls.rs helper), and call them from both delivery.rs and server.rs. This removes 15 lines of duplicated URL parsing.
close_reason: P2-P3: RateLimiter::new returns Self, remaining items accepted as known tech debt or tracked in hardening epic
